h1: Sheng Ji Benefits & Real Effects: Wealth, Career, Longevity — What to Expect and When
heroSub: Honest, evidence-based account of Sheng Ji effects — no exaggeration, no false promises, backed by full client video evidence

sections.h2: Three Phases of Sheng Ji Effects

items.h3: Phase 1 (Within 1 Month): Visible Improvement in Complexion and Vitality
items.content: Based on Master Lin's multi-decade observations, the first measurable change is physical: the three facial zones linked to fortune and vitality in Chinese physiognomy — the forehead (tian ting), the space between the brows (yin tang), and the nose tip (bi zhun) — develop a naturally radiant quality. People close to the client frequently remark unprompted on the improvement. This is the first observable signal that the dragon vein's earth qi has begun circulating through the client's energetic system.

items.h3: Phase 2 (1–3 Months): Helpful People, Cleared Paths, Easier Progress
items.content: After the initial physical signals, destiny-level shifts emerge: previously difficult relationships become more cooperative, stalled projects begin moving, and beneficial people appear at key moments without the client actively seeking them. As Master Lin's teaching puts it: 'After Sheng Ji, modest effort produces visible results' — the threshold for success decreases noticeably.

items.h3: Phase 3 (3–6 Months): Career and Financial Changes Become Concrete
items.content: For clients focused on career advancement or financial growth, concrete outcomes typically arrive within 3 to 6 months. The counter-current water formation of the Fu Gui Shuang Quan plot is classically designated for rapid wealth generation, making financial improvement the most consistently reported outcome across this timeframe.

items.h3: Career & Official Fortune: Promotions, Access and Influence
items.content: The dragon vein plot's official-rank energy (官貴之氣) — confirmed by the classical 'San Hu Liang Dong Gua' formation — creates conditions where the client's career-related efforts are systematically amplified. Clients report that previously inaccessible doors open, influential people become cooperative, and decision-making opportunities that were previously out of reach begin presenting themselves.

items.h3: Wealth Activation: Opening Financial Channels from Multiple Directions
items.content: The three-river counter-current configuration generates what classical Feng Shui texts describe as a 'speed-wealth' environment. Clients seeking financial improvement consistently report that financial channels open from unexpected directions — long-delayed payments received, new partnerships formed, additional income sources appearing — rather than a single large windfall.

items.h3: Longevity, Protection & Family: Health, Safety and Relationships
items.content: Clients seeking longevity and protection report sustained improvements in energy levels, sleep quality and general health vitality. The Day 1 disaster-dispelling ritual specifically addresses dangerous fate nodes in the client's BaZi chart, reducing the probability of major adverse events during the Sheng Ji period. Clients seeking marriage or fertility support report improved interpersonal attractiveness and, in some cases, successful pregnancies after extended trying periods.

sections.h2: How to Verify Sheng Ji Effects

items.h3: Request Full Client Ceremony Videos Before Committing
items.content: We can provide full-length, unedited ceremony videos from previous clients for review prior to payment. These videos include the complete Day 1 studio ritual and Day 2 dragon vein interment, including the core box-burial moment. Contact WeChat NSDG521 to request access.

items.h3: The 5-Year Package Is the Lowest-Risk Way to Experience Results Firsthand
items.content: For clients who remain uncertain, the 5-Year Experience package (RMB 72,000) is the most appropriate starting point. You receive the complete service with full video documentation, the dragon-qi garment and the silver ingot. If results exceed expectations within the five years, you can upgrade to Lifetime by paying the difference. The experience itself provides the most direct evidence available.
